title: Easy Spinosaurus Coloring Page
seoTitle: Free Easy Spinosaurus Coloring Page (Printable PDF)
seoDescription: Download and print this simple kids Spinosaurus coloring page. Perfect for young children and toddlers. Free high-res PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Spinosaurus featured a long, narrow snout lined with straight, conical teeth, perfectly designed for gripping slippery fish.
Spinosaurus was the largest known carnivorous dinosaur, measuring up to 50 feet (15 meters) long—even larger than Tyrannosaurus Rex.
